blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: rain, highs of 41°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
